name: showLessonPhase
description: Update the compact BiteCode mentor status label when the lesson moves to a new planned phase. Call once at the start of each phase, before speaking its content. Do not call for minor transitions or repeat the same phase.

parameters.description: One-based current phase number, such as 1.
Total number of planned lesson phases. Keep this value stable throughout the call and no greater than 10.
Short learner-facing phase label, ideally two to five words, such as Calibration questions, Core concept, Guided example, Understanding check, or Wrap-up.
